prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II** turbos (hybrid billet wheels, 62mm compressor, 76mm turbine) for the **C7 RS6's 4.0L TFSI V8 (engine code: CTS)** with **Precision Turbo & Engine wastegates (PN 8268)** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV (PN 5402)** to handle 1.5+ bar of boost while maintaining OEM-like spool characteristics. Requires **custom 4-inch downpipes (VF Engineering)** with **200-cell catalytic converters (REMUS)** for emissions compliance and **upgraded intercooler cores (Wagner Tuning Competition)** with **aluminum charge pipes (034 Motorsport)** to eliminate heat soak at 700+ HP.

Full **Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion** with **AEM CD-7 dash integration** for real-time lambda, boost, and knock monitoring. Includes **custom flex-fuel sensor (Continental)** and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 high-flow fuel injectors** (1,500cc/min) paired with **AEM 400LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN 50-1200)** and **Radium Engineering dual external fuel pumps (PN 20-0118)** to support E85 blends. **APR Stage 3+ software** with **custom ignition timing maps** and **ported cylinder heads (Mahle Motorsport)** for optimized combustion efficiency.

Drivetrain reinforcement with **034 Motorsport billet differential (PN 034-011-001S)** and **Quattro GmbH RS7-spec rear differential carrier** to handle 800+ Nm of torque. **South Bend Clutch Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch (PN 2600006)** with **aluminum flywheel (Spec Clutch)** and **034 Motorsport transmission mounts (PN 034-011-002S)** to prevent drivetrain deflection. **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** with **H&R 20mm front / 15mm rear sway bars** and **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement kit (PN 034-011-003S)** for chassis rigidity under extreme lateral loads.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Design)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon Carbon)** and **rear diffuser (AWE Tuning)** for aggressive stance. **OEM+ RS7-style LED headlights (Lux HID)** with **custom C7 RS6-specific DRL delete** and **blacked-out Audi rings (PlastiDip)** for stealth aesthetics. **Vorsteiner V-FF107 21-inch forged wheels** (9.5J ET30 front, 11J ET40 rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30 R21 front, 305/25 R21 rear)** for track-focused grip.

Full **custom interior overhaul** with **Recaro Pole Position seats (SPG XL)** wrapped in **Nappa leather (Bridge of Weir)** with **Alcantara headliner (Euro Design USA)**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm)** with **custom RS6-specific airbag delete** and **AiM MXL2 data logger** integrated into the **OEM infotainment screen (Kufatec adapter)**. **Custom roll cage (Autopower Industries)** with **bolt-in harness bar (Cusco)** and **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** for track use.

Exterior carbon fiber accents including **Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-style with functional vents)**, **carbon fiber mirror caps (VMR)**, and **custom rear spoiler (AWE Tuning Track Edition)**. **Full PPF (XPEL Ultimate Plus)** with **ceramic coating (Gyeon Quartz)** for paint protection. **Custom LED taillight delete (Lux HID)** with **smoked lenses** and **OEM RS7-style rear bumper (Eurocode Tuning)** featuring **dual 4-inch exhaust outlets (REMUS Valved Titanium)** for aggressive sound and visuals.
